nodes.description: name: Caprese Sandwich — Citrus Fresh Variation | short_description: Caprese-style sandwich on whole-grain bread with mozzarella, tomato, basil, and balsamic—a fresh, protein- and fiber-rich lunch opt
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Caprese Sandwich — Citrus Fresh Variation - name: Caprese Sandwich — Citrus Fresh Variation | short_description: Caprese-style sandwich on whole-grain bread with mozzarella, tomato, basil, and balsamic—a fresh, protein- and fiber-rich lunch option. | meal_suggestion: One sandwich serves as a balanced lunch. For the Citrus Fresh Variation, add a light squeeze of lemon or orange juice over the filling or serve with citrus wedges; consider a small side salad for extra greens. | nutrition_note: Fiber from whole-grain bread and vegetables; protein from mozzarella; vitamins and antioxidants from tomato and basil; balsamic adds flavor with modest calories.

nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Teriyaki Chicken Bowl — Garden Veg Style - name: Teriyaki Chicken Bowl — Garden Veg Style | short_description: Teriyaki chicken bowl with garden vegetables over rice — a protein-rich, veggie-forward meal. | meal_suggestion: A quick, balanced bowl of lean chicken, rice, and mixed vegetables coated in teriyaki glaze. For a lighter version, swap in brown rice and low-sodium sauce to increase fiber and lower sodium. | nutrition_note: Protein from chicken; carbohydrates from rice; fiber and micronutrients from mixed vegetables; teriyaki sauce adds flavor but can be high in sodium; to boost fiber and reduce sodium, use brown rice and/or a reduced-sodium sauce and add more vegetables as desired.

nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Caprese Sandwich — Maple-Kissed Set - name: Caprese Sandwich — Maple-Kissed Set | short_description: Caprese-inspired sandwich on whole-grain bread with mozzarella, tomato, basil, and balsamic. | meal_suggestion: Enjoy with a side salad or fruit; drizzle a teaspoon of olive oil for healthy fats if desired; keep portion size moderate to fit a balanced meal. | nutrition_note: Balanced meal with protein from mozzarella and fiber from whole-grain bread; tomato and basil provide vitamins and antioxidants; balsamic adds flavor with minimal calories; moderate sodium from cheese. For lower fat, use part-skim mozzarella.
